productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Heritagio V Trx HG White Sports Shoes
description: Gear up and win those goals in style with the adidas Heritagio V TRX Hard Ground cleats. Lightweight and strong, this shoe is designed to ensure better ball contact and enhance performance. Team this with soccer shorts and sportswear t-shirts and watch your energies rise.UpperSynthetic leather upper for lightweight comfort and durability Stitch detailing for durability and style Symmetrical lacing system for better ball feel and ball control, besides allowing you to customize the Fit Mildly padded tongue and collar for in-step comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceMidsolePU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Padded sockliner for all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking and non-slip rubber outsole with traxion hard ground cleats strategically placed for absolute performance and stability on hard surfacesShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
